channel.title: Shanghai Weather Forecast
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Shanghai via QWeather.

item.title: 2026-03-23: Light Rain, 11°C - 17°C
item.description:
Condition (Day): Light Rain (Icon: 305)
Condition (Night): Light Rain (Icon: 305)
Temperature: 11°C to 17°C
Precipitation: 0.0 mm
Cloud Cover: 4%

Wind (Day): E (90°), Scale 1-3, Speed 3 km/h
Wind (Night): NE (45°), Scale 1-3, Speed 3 km/h

Humidity: 92%
Visibility: 23 km
Sun: Rise 05:56, Set 18:08
Moon: Rise 08:11, Set 22:59 (Phase: Waxing crescent,801)
UV Index: 4
